    <script>
        /* remove unwanted cookies (shredder) */
        document.cookie.split('; ').forEach(cookie => {
            let name = cookie.split('=')[0];
            let text = "wp-settings";
            if (name.includes(text)) {
                console.log("String exists: " + name);
                document.cookie = name + '=; expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT; path=/';
            }
        });


    </script>

<script>

var pageContentVisible = false  ;
var pageContentNeedsPayment = false ;



    class MyCustomOfferwallChoice {
        constructor() {
            this.isUserEntitledToAccess = true
            this.isCustomOfferwallChoiceDisabled = false
        }
        async initialize() {
            return Promise.resolve(
               window.googlefc.offerwall.customchoice.InitializeResponseEnum.ACCESS_GRANTED,
            );
        }

        async show() {
        }
    }


    console.log("TIUN offerwall init") ;

// document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function(event) { 
    window.googlefc = window.googlefc || {};
    window.googlefc.offerwall = window.googlefc.offerwall || {};
    window.googlefc.offerwall.customchoice = window.googlefc.offerwall.customchoice || {};
    window.googlefc.offerwall.customchoice.registry = new MyCustomOfferwallChoice()
// });

function forwardTiun() {
    // Get the current page URL
    const currentUrl = new URL(window.location.href);

    // Add new query parameters
    currentUrl.searchParams.set('offerwall', '2');
    // currentUrl.searchParams.set('nocache', Math.random() );

    window.location.href = currentUrl.href ;
}

function forwardNoTiun() {
    // Get the current page URL
    const currentUrl = new URL(window.location.href);

    // Add new query parameters
    currentUrl.searchParams.delete('offerwall');
    // currentUrl.searchParams.set('nocache', Math.random() );

    window.location.href = currentUrl.href ;
}
    
</script>



<script>

    window.addEventListener('message', (event) => {

        // console.log( event.data ) ;

        if (event.data?.type === 'TIUN_EVENT') {

            const content =event.data?.content || '' ;

            if (content === 'TIUN_SNIPPET_INITIALIZED') {
                updateContentInfo();
            }

            if (content === 'TIUN_SNIPPET_INTERACTION') {

                var interactionType = event.data.interactionType; // string
                var paymentMethod = event.data.paymentMethod; // string or undefined
                // TODO: send interactionType (and paymentMethod where available)
                //       to your tracking system

                // Session Start
                if ( interactionType == "StartSession" ) {
                }

            }

            // * ----------------------------------------------------------------
            //   Content Verbergen
            // * ----------------------------------------------------------------

            if ( content == "TIUN_SHOW_PAYWALL" ) {

                showPaywall( event ) ;

            }

            // * ----------------------------------------------------------------
            //   Content Anzeigen
            // * ----------------------------------------------------------------

            if ( content == "TIUN_HIDE_PAYWALL" ) {

                hidePaywall( event ) ;

            }

        }

        function hidePaywall ( event ) {

            const sessionId = event.data?.sessionId || '' ;
            let localTiuSession = localStorage.getItem('TiuSession') || '';

            if ( localTiuSession != sessionId ) {
                localStorage.setItem('TiuSession', sessionId ) ;
                const url = '/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php?action=getuserabo&tiun=' + sessionId;
                jQuery.ajax({
                    url: url,
                    type: 'POST',
                    dataType: "json",
                    success: function (response) {
                        const isContentenVisible = response.status == 2;
                        if (isContentenVisible != pageContentVisible) {
                            // reload
                            // debugger
                            console.log("Reload after Hide Paywall") ;
                            forwardNoTiun();
                        }
                    },
                });
            }

        }

        function showPaywall ( event ) {

            console.log("Show Paywall")

            const sessionId = event.data?.sessionId || '' ;
            let localTiuSession = localStorage.getItem('TiuSession') || '';

            if ( localTiuSession != sessionId ) {
                localStorage.setItem('TiuSession', sessionId);

                const url = '/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php?action=getuserabo&tiun_clear=1';

                jQuery.ajax({
                    url: url,
                    type: 'POST',
                    dataType: "json",
                    success: function (response) {
                        const isContentenVisible = response.status == 2;
                        if (isContentenVisible != pageContentVisible) {
                            // reload
                            console.log("Reload after Show Paywall")
                            forwardNoTiun() ;
                        }
                    },
                });
            }
        }

        // Rückmelden an Tiun ob die aktive Session gezählt werden muss
        // oder ob es Free Content ist.

        function updateContentInfo() {
            window.postMessage(
                {
                    type: 'TIUN_EVENT',
                    content: 'TIUN_UPDATE_CONTENT',
                    contentType: pageContentNeedsPayment ? 'active' : 'inactive'
                },
                window.location.origin
            );
        }
    });

</script>

            (function () {
                /* CONFIGURATION START */
                var _sf_async_config = window._sf_async_config = (window._sf_async_config || {});
                _sf_async_config.uid = 67206;
                _sf_async_config.domain = 'weltwoche.de';
                _sf_async_config.useCanonical = true;
                _sf_async_config.useCanonicalDomain = true;
                _sf_async_config.playerdomain = 'cdn.jwplayer.com';



                var _cbq = window._cbq = (window._cbq || []);
                _cbq.push(['_acct', 'anon']);

                /* get sections abo / free from meta data: weltwoche_meta_access */
                                _sf_async_config.sections = '<< FREE >>';
                
                _sf_async_config.authors = "Die Weltwoche";
                                _sf_async_config.mobileApp = false;
                                _sf_async_config.pingServer = 'pong.chartbeat.net';

                // CONFIGURATION END
                function loadChartbeat() {
                    var e = document.createElement('script');
                    var n = document.getElementsByTagName('script')[0];
                    e.type = 'text/javascript';
                    e.async = true;
                    // e.src = '//static.chartbeat.com/js/chartbeat.js';
                    e.src = '//static.chartbeat.com/js/chartbeat_video.js';
                    n.parentNode.insertBefore(e, n);
                }

                loadChartbeat();
            })();
        </script>

        <!-- Chartbeat Conversion -->
        <script type="text/javascript" data-cmp-ab="1">
            (function (w, d, s, c, u) {
                var qf = function (e, a) {
                    (w[c].q = w[c].q || []).push([e, a]);
                };
                w[c] = w[c] || qf;
                var st = d.createElement(s);
                var fs = d.getElementsByTagName(s)[0];
                st.async = 1;
                st.src = u;
                fs.parentNode.insertBefore(st, fs);
            })(window, document, 'script', 'chartbeat', 'https://static.chartbeat.com/js/subscriptions.js');
        </script>
        <!-- End Chartbeat Conversion -->

        <script>
            function chartbeatTrack(event, args) {
                const excludedPatterns = [
                    // /^\/abo(\/.*)?$/,
                    // /^\/suche(\/.*)?$/,
                    // /^\/mein(\/.*)?$/,
                    // /^\/newsletter(\/.*)?$/
                ];
                const path = window.location.pathname;
                const isExcluded = excludedPatterns.some(pattern => pattern.test(path));
                if (!isExcluded) {
                    console.log('chartbeat', event, args);
                    if (typeof chartbeat === 'function') {
                        chartbeat(event, args);
                    }
                } else {
                    console.log('Chartbeat skipped on', path);
                }
            }

        </script>

<script type="text/javascript" id="cld-frontend-js" data-cmp-ab="2">function cld_setCookie(cname, cvalue, exdays) {
    var d = new Date();
    d.setTime(d.getTime() + (exdays * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
    var expires = "expires=" + d.toUTCString();
    document.cookie = cname + "=" + cvalue + "; " + expires;
}

function cld_getCookie(cname) {
    var name = cname + "=";
    var ca = document.cookie.split(';');
    for (var i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
        var c = ca[i];
        while (c.charAt(0) == ' ') {
            c = c.substring(1);
        }
        if (c.indexOf(name) == 0) {
            return c.substring(name.length, c.length);
        }
    }
    return "";
}

jQuery(document).ready(function ($) {
    var ajax_flag = 0;
    $('body').on('click', '.cld-like-dislike-trigger', function () {
        if (ajax_flag == 0) {
            var restriction = $(this).data('restriction');
            var comment_id = $(this).data('comment-id');
            var trigger_type = $(this).data('trigger-type');
            var selector = $(this);
            var cld_cookie = cld_getCookie('cld_' + comment_id);
            var current_count = selector.closest('.cld-common-wrap').find('.cld-count-wrap').html();
            var new_count = parseInt(current_count) + 1;
            var ip_check = $(this).data('ip-check');
            var user_check = $(this).data('user-check');
            var like_dislike_flag = 1;
            if (restriction == 'cookie' && cld_cookie != '') {
                like_dislike_flag = 0;
                if(cld_cookie != trigger_type){
                    like_dislike_flag = 1;
                }
            }
            if (restriction == 'ip' && ip_check == '1') {
                like_dislike_flag = 0;

            }
            if (restriction == 'user' && user_check == '1') {
                like_dislike_flag = 0;
            }
            if (like_dislike_flag == 1) {
                $.ajax({
                    type: 'post',
                    url: cld_js_object.admin_ajax_url,
                    data: {
                        comment_id: comment_id,
                        action: 'cld_comment_ajax_action',
                        type: trigger_type,
                        update: cld_cookie,
                        _wpnonce: cld_js_object.admin_ajax_nonce
                    },
                    beforeSend: function (xhr) {
                        ajax_flag = 1;
                        
                    },
                    success: function (res) {
                        ajax_flag = 0;
                        res = $.parseJSON(res);
                        if (res.success) {
                            if (restriction == 'ip') {
                                selector.closest('.cld-like-dislike-wrap').find('.cld-like-dislike-trigger').data('ip-check', 1);
                            }
                            if (restriction == 'user') {
                                selector.closest('.cld-like-dislike-wrap').find('.cld-like-dislike-trigger').data('user-check', 1);
                            }
                            var cookie_name = 'cld_' + comment_id;
                            cld_setCookie(cookie_name, trigger_type, 10);
                            var latest_count = res.latest_count;
                            selector.closest('.cld-common-wrap').find('.cld-count-wrap').html(latest_count);

                            var c = 0;
                            if(trigger_type != cld_cookie){
                                c = selector.closest('.cld-like-dislike-wrap').find('.cld-'+cld_cookie+'-count-wrap').html();
                                c--;
                                selector.closest('.cld-like-dislike-wrap').find('.cld-'+cld_cookie+'-count-wrap').html(c);
                            }

                        }
                    }

                });
            }
        }
    });


    $('.cld-like-dislike-wrap br,.cld-like-dislike-wrap p').remove();


});

        // reload ads
        let timer;

        // function startTimer() {
        //     timer = setInterval(function () {
        //         window.audienzz.refreshAds();
        //         // googletag.pubads().refresh();
        //     }, 60000);
        // }


        function isInViewport(el) {
            const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
            return rect.top < window.innerHeight && rect.bottom > 0;
        }

        function refreshVisibleAds() {
            console.log('refreshVisibleAds');
            googletag.cmd.push(function () {
                var slots = googletag.pubads().getSlots();

                var visibleSlots = slots.filter(function (slot) {
                    var el = document.getElementById(slot.getSlotElementId());
                    return el && isInViewport(el);
                });

                if (visibleSlots.length) {
                    googletag.pubads().refresh(visibleSlots);
                }
            });
        }

        function startTimer() {
            timer = setInterval(refreshVisibleAds, 31000);
        }

        startTimer();

    }

    
    var s = readCookie('ww_app');
    var cc = readCookie('ww_consent');
    if(s != null){
        if(s == 'app'){
            var c = readCookie('cookie_notice_accepted');
            if(c == null){
                jQuery('#cookie-notice').remove();
                createCookie('cookie_notice_accepted', '1', 360);
            }

            const queryString = window.location.search;
            const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(queryString);
            const consent = urlParams.get('consent');
            if(consent == 'false' ||(cc != null && cc == 0)){
                jQuery('#BorlabsCookieBox').remove();
                jQuery('#CybotCookiebotDialog').remove();
                jQuery('#CybotCookiebotDialogBodyUnderlay').remove();
                jQuery('#cookie-notice').remove();
                createCookie('cookie_notice_accepted', '1', 360);
                if(cc != 0){
                    createCookie('ww_consent', '0', 360);
                }
            }
            else if(consent == 'true'){
                if(cc != null && cc != 1){
                    createCookie('ww_consent', '1', 360);
                }
            }
            else {
                createCookie('borlabs-cookie', '', -1);
                jQuery('#BorlabsCookieBox').attr('style','opacity: 1 !important');
                jQuery('#CybotCookiebotDialog').attr('style','opacity: 1 !important');
                
            }

            
            var thisLink = '';
            jQuery('.contentBody a').each(function(){
                thisLink = jQuery(this).attr('href');
                if(typeof thisLink != 'undefined'){
                    if(thisLink.indexOf(window.location.hostname) !== -1){
                        
                    }
                    else if(thisLink.indexOf('page.link') !== -1){
                        
                    }
                    else{
                        if(thisLink.indexOf('?') !== -1){
                            jQuery(this).attr('href',thisLink+'&browser');
                        }
                        else{
                            jQuery(this).attr('href',thisLink+'?browser');
                        }
                    }
                }
            });

            
            createCookie('ww_splash', '1', 0);

        }
        else{
            jQuery('#BorlabsCookieBox').attr('style','opacity: 1 !important');
            jQuery('#CybotCookiebotDialog').attr('style','opacity: 1 !important');
            
        }
    }
    else{
        jQuery('#BorlabsCookieBox').attr('style','opacity: 1 !important');
        jQuery('#CybotCookiebotDialog').attr('style','opacity: 1 !important');
        
    }

    
    jQuery('.weeklyContentBody iframe').each(function() {
        var video = jQuery(this);
        var vidSrc = '';
        vidSrc = video.attr('src');
        
        if(vidSrc.indexOf('youtube.com/embed/') != -1){
            
            if(jQuery(this).parent().get(0).tagName == 'P'){
                
                jQuery(this).parent().addClass('videoWrapper');
            }
        }
    });

    
    initInView();

    
    
    reloadTimeout = 36000000000;
    reloadTimer = window.setTimeout(reloadPage,reloadTimeout);


    jQuery(document).on('gform_post_render', function(event, form_id, current_page){
        var domainstring = document.location.href;
        var no = 8;
        if(domainstring.indexOf('seaio') !== -1){
            no = 6;
        }
        if(form_id == no && jQuery('.serviceForm').length){
            prefillServiceForm();
        }
    });

    


    
    


    
    if(jQuery('.userFavorites').length != 0){
        jQuery(".favorites-list").each(function(){
            jQuery(this).html(jQuery(this).children('li').sort(function(a, b){
                return (jQuery(b).data('postid')) > (jQuery(a).data('postid')) ? 1 : -1;
            }));
        });
        jQuery('.userFavorites').fadeIn();
    }


    
    if(window.location.hash.substring(1) == 'kommentare'){
        jQuery('html, body').animate({
            scrollTop: jQuery('#comments').offset().top
        }, 1000);
    }


});

    event.preventDefault();

    jQuery('html, body').animate({
        scrollTop: jQuery($.attr(this, 'href')).offset().top
    }, 1000);
});

            jQuery('#post_0').css('left', postLeft);
            jQuery('#post_0').css('width', postWidth);
            jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('top', postTop);
        }
    }

});

function initInView(){
    jQuery(".teaserwerbung").on('inview', function(event, isVisible) {
        if (!isVisible) { return; }
        var id = jQuery(this).attr('id');
        id = parseInt(id.replace("post_", ""));
        if(id != 0){
            var site_prefix = '/';
            if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
                site_prefix = '/fr/';
            }
            jQuery.ajax({
                url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
                type : 'get',
                dataType: 'JSON',
                data : {
                    action : 'teaserwerbungcount',
                    id : id
                },
                success : function( response ) {
                },
            });
        }
    });
}



function getiOSversion() {
    if (/iP(hone|od|ad)/.test(navigator.platform)) {
        
        var v = (navigator.appVersion).match(/OS (\d+)_(\d+)_?(\d+)?/);
        return [parseInt(v[1], 10), parseInt(v[2], 10), parseInt(v[3] || 0, 10)];
    }
    else{
        return [];
    }
}




function appControl() {
	
	return true;
}

function appAbo(data) {
    var payload = JSON.parse(data);
    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'post',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'getuserabo',
            payload : payload
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            
            window.appabo = response;

            if(response.status == 1){
                jQuery('.headerIconAbo').fadeOut();
            }
            else{
                jQuery('.headerIconAbo').fadeIn();
            }
        },
    });
    return window.appabo;
}


function confirmDeleteComment(id){
    UIkit.modal.confirm('Wollen Sie diesen Kommentar wirklich löschen?').then(function() {
        
        var site_prefix = '/';
        if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
            site_prefix = '/fr/';
        }
        jQuery.ajax({
            url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
            type : 'get',
            dataType: 'JSON',
            data : {
                action : 'deletecomment',
                id : id
            },
            success : function( response ) {
                if(response.status == 1){
                    jQuery('#div-comment-'+id).remove();
                }
            }
        });
    }, function () {
        
    });
}


function setFontsize(t){
    
    var s = 3;
    var fs = readCookie('ww_fontsize');
    if(fs != null){
        s = parseInt(fs);
    }
    
    if(t == '-'){
        if(s > 1){
            s--;
        }
    }
    else if(t == '+'){
        if(s < 7){
            s++;
        }
    }
    else {
        s = t;
    }
    
    var p = 100;
    if(s == 1){ p = 60; }
    else if(s == 2){ p = 80; }
    else if(s == 4){ p = 120; }
    else if(s == 5){ p = 140; }
    else if(s == 6){ p = 160; }
    else if(s == 7){ p = 180; }
    jQuery('.fontsizeSelectorText i').html(p);
    
    jQuery('body').removeClass('fontSize1');
    jQuery('body').removeClass('fontSize2');
    jQuery('body').removeClass('fontSize4');
    jQuery('body').removeClass('fontSize5');
    jQuery('body').removeClass('fontSize6');
    jQuery('body').removeClass('fontSize7');
    if(s != 3){
        jQuery('body').addClass('fontSize'+s);
    }
    
    if(s == 1 || s == 2 || s == 4 || s == 5 || s == 6 || s == 7){
        createCookie('ww_fontsize', s, 360);
    }
    else{
        eraseCookie('ww_fontsize');
    }
}






function closePrint () {
    document.body.removeChild(this.__container__);
}
function setPrint () {
    this.contentWindow.__container__ = this;
    this.contentWindow.onbeforeunload = closePrint;
    this.contentWindow.onafterprint = closePrint;
    this.contentWindow.focus(); 
    this.contentWindow.print();
}
function printPage (sURL) {
    var oHideFrame = document.createElement("iframe");
    oHideFrame.onload = setPrint;
    oHideFrame.style.position = "fixed";
    oHideFrame.style.right = "0";
    oHideFrame.style.bottom = "0";
    oHideFrame.style.width = "0";
    oHideFrame.style.height = "0";
    oHideFrame.style.border = "0";
    oHideFrame.src = sURL;
    document.body.appendChild(oHideFrame);
}


function getScrollbarWidth() {
  
  const outer = document.createElement('div');
  outer.style.visibility = 'hidden';
  outer.style.overflow = 'scroll'; 
  outer.style.msOverflowStyle = 'scrollbar'; 
  document.body.appendChild(outer);

  
  const inner = document.createElement('div');
  outer.appendChild(inner);

  
  const scrollbarWidth = (outer.offsetWidth - inner.offsetWidth);

  
  outer.parentNode.removeChild(outer);

  return scrollbarWidth;
}

    UIkit.modal('#'+id).show();
}


doTeaserDetail = 1;
function teaserClick(id,type,pos,url,video){
    
    window.location.href = url;
    return;


    if(doTeaserDetail == 1){
        doTeaserDetail = 0;
        if (iOSversion.length > 0 && iOSversion[0] <= 12) {
            window.location.href = url;
        }
        else if(type == 'detail' || type == 'detailsmall' || type == 'detailgrid'){
            if(jQuery('#werbungTop').height() > 0 && jQuery('#werbungTop').height() == jQuery("#topheader").offset().top){
                
                
                

                
                jQuery('body').animate({
                    scrollTop: jQuery("#topheader").offset().top
                    }, {
                    
                    duration: 0,
                    complete: function(){
                        
                        
                            postDetail(id,type,pos,video);
                        }
                    
                });

            }
            else{
                
                
                    postDetail(id,type,pos,video);
               
            }
        }
    }
}

        jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('position', 'fixed');

        
        jQuery('#post_0').fadeOut(
            400,
            function(){

                    var videoPostId = jQuery('#post_0').find('.postTeaserBigVideo').attr('data-id');
                    var video =jQuery('#post_0 .postTeaserBigVideo').html();

                }

                jQuery('#copyPostDiv').hide();
                jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('position', '');
                jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('top', '');
                jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('bottom', '');
                jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('height', '');
                history.pushState('', '', '/');

                jQuery('.postTeaserGridAbo').show();

                jQuery('#postList').animate({
                    opacity: 1
                    }, {
                    duration: 400,
                    complete: function(){
                        try {
                            window.audienzz.refreshAds();
                            
                        }
                        catch(err) {
                            
                        }
                    }
                });

            }
        );
    }
}


function postDetail(id,type,pos,video){
    var scrollbarWidth = getScrollbarWidth();

    
    jQuery('#post_0').remove();
    
    jQuery('#copyPostDiv').show();

    
    jQuery('#login_redirect_to_post').val(id);

    typ = 'Big';
    if(type == 'detailgrid'){
        typ = 'Grid';
    }

    
    actScrollTop = jQuery(window).scrollTop();

    var topHeader = jQuery('#topheader').height();
    var imageWidth = jQuery('#post_'+id+' .postTeaserImage').width();
    var imageHeight = jQuery('#post_'+id+' .postTeaserImage').height();
    var imageOffset = jQuery('#post_'+id+' .postTeaserImage').offset();
    var imageLeft = imageOffset.left;
    var imageTop = imageOffset.top - jQuery(window).scrollTop();
    imageTop = imageTop-topHeader;

    
    jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('top', actScrollTop-jQuery('#werbungTop').height());


    jQuery('#post_'+id).clone().appendTo('#copyPostDiv');
    jQuery('#copyPostDiv>div').attr("id",'post_0');


    
    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'get',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'getweekly',
            id : id
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            
            

            if(jQuery(".weeklyCode").length == 0){
                jQuery('#post_0').append(response.code);
            }

            
            jQuery('.A_LT_MIT_EZ_9_3_x08').each(function(){
                 var me = jQuery(this);
                 me.html(me.html().replace(/^([a-zA-Z ]+):/, '<span style="font-family: Lexicon-3;">$1:</span>'));
            });
            jQuery('#post_0 .weeklyPlaceholder').remove();
            jQuery('#post_0 .weeklyCode').delay(500).fadeIn(function(){
                
                var video = jQuery('#post_'+response.id+' .postTeaserBigVideo').html();
                jQuery('#post_'+response.id+' .postTeaserBigVideo').html('');
                jQuery('#post_0 .postTeaserBigVideo').html(video);
            });

            history.pushState({}, null, response.url);

            try {
                window.audienzz.refreshAds();
                
            }
            catch(err) {
                
            }
        },
    });


    jQuery('#post_0').css('width', imageWidth);
    jQuery('#post_0').css('top', imageTop);
    jQuery('#post_0').css('left', imageLeft);
    jQuery('#post_0').removeAttr('onclick');
    jQuery('#post_0').removeClass('postTeaser'+typ);

    
    jQuery('#post_0 .postTeaser'+typ+'Bottom').remove();
    jQuery('#post_0 .postTeaserBigTop').remove();
    jQuery('#post_0 .postTeaserGridTitleGreen').remove();
    jQuery('#post_0 .postTeaserGridTitleBlue').remove();
    jQuery('#post_0 .postTeaserGridTitle').remove();
    jQuery('#post_0 .postTeaserGridAutor').remove();

    jQuery('.postTeaserGridAbo').hide();

    if(video == 1){
        
        jQuery('#post_0').find('.postTeaserImage').remove();
        jQuery('#post_0').find('.postTeaserImageVideoIcon').remove();
    }
    else{
        
        var imageHeightAnimate ='450px';
        if(imageHeight != 0){
            if(jQuery('#post_0').find('.postTeaserBigVideo').length != 1){
                
                jQuery('#post_0').find('.postTeaserImage').animate({
                    height: imageHeightAnimate,
                    }, {
                    
                    duration: 0,
                });
            }
        }

        
        var aPos = pos.split(" ");
        
        jQuery('#post_0').find('.postTeaserImage').css('object-position',aPos[0]+aPos[1]);
        
    }

    var newWidth = jQuery('#postList').width();
    var newOffset = jQuery('#postList').offset();
    var newLeft = newOffset.left;

    
    
    jQuery('#post_0').animate({
        width: newWidth,
        top: 0,
        left: newLeft
        }, {
        
        duration: 0,
        complete: function(){
            var winHeight = jQuery(window).height();

            var headerHeight = jQuery('#topheader').height();

            var newHeight = winHeight-headerHeight;
            jQuery('body').addClass('bodyNoScroll');
            UIkit.update(element = document.body, type = 'update');

            jQuery('#werbungTop').hide();

            jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('position', 'fixed');
            jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('top', headerHeight+'px');
            jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('bottom', 0);
            jQuery('#copyPostDiv').css('height', 'auto');

            jQuery('.headerSideRight').hide();
            jQuery('.headerSideRightBack').fadeIn();

            try {
                
            }
            catch(err) { }

            doTeaserDetail = 1;
        }
    });
}


function checkPostDetail(){
    if(jQuery('#post_0').length){
        postOverview();
        
        clearReloadPage();
    }
    else{
        var loc = jQuery(this).attr('href');
        if(typeof loc != 'undefined'){
            window.location.href = loc;
        }
        else{
            window.location.href = '/';
        }
    }
}





function createCookie(name, value, days) {
    var expires;

    if (days) {
        var date = new Date();
        date.setTime(date.getTime() + (days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000));
        expires = "; expires=" + date.toGMTString();
    } else {
        expires = "";
    }

    var s = 'SameSite=None;Secure';
    if (location.protocol == 'http:') {
        s = '';
    }

    document.cookie = encodeURIComponent(name) + "=" + encodeURIComponent(value) + expires + "; path=/;"+s;
}

function readCookie(name) {
    var nameEQ = encodeURIComponent(name) + "=";
    var ca = document.cookie.split(';');
    for (var i = 0; i < ca.length; i++) {
        var c = ca[i];
        while (c.charAt(0) === ' ')
            c = c.substring(1, c.length);
        if (c.indexOf(nameEQ) === 0)
            return decodeURIComponent(c.substring(nameEQ.length, c.length));
    }
    return null;
}

function eraseCookie(name) {
    createCookie(name, "", -1);
}



function toggleHeadernav(typ){
    if(jQuery('#headerNav').is(':visible')){
        if(!jQuery('.headerNav'+typ).is(':visible')){
            if(typ == 'Menu'){
                jQuery('.headerNavSearch').hide();
                jQuery('.headerNavMenu').fadeIn();
            }
            else{
                jQuery('.headerNavMenu').hide();
                jQuery('.headerNavSearch').fadeIn();
            }
        }
        else{
            jQuery('#headerNav').slideToggle(function(){
                jQuery('.headerNavSearch').hide();
                jQuery('.headerNavMenu').hide();
            });
        }
    }
    else{
        jQuery('.headerNav'+typ).show();
        jQuery('#headerNav').slideToggle();
        jQuery('#searchFormQuick input[name=q]').focus();
    }

    if(typ == 'Search'){
        jQuery('.headerIconSearch span').each(function(){
            var icon = jQuery(this).attr('uk-icon');
            if(icon.indexOf('search') == -1){
                icon = icon.replace('close','search');
            }
            else{
                icon = icon.replace('search','close');
            }
            jQuery(this).attr('uk-icon',icon);
        });
    }


}

    jQuery('#iframeOverlay_'+id).fadeOut();
}


function beitragLike(id,typ){
    
    
    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'post',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'like',
            id : id,
            typ : typ
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            jQuery('#beitrag_like_'+id).html(response.like);
            jQuery('#beitrag_unlike_'+id).html(response.unlike);
            jQuery('#beitrag_like_'+id+'-2').html(response.like);
            jQuery('#beitrag_unlike_'+id+'-2').html(response.unlike);
        },
    });
}

        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'likecount',
            id : id
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            jQuery('#beitrag_like_'+id).html(response.like);
            jQuery('#beitrag_unlike_'+id).html(response.unlike);
        },
    });
}

}

function checkTextAreaMaxLength(textBox, e) {
    
    var maxLength = 500;
    if (!checkSpecialKeys(e)) {
        if (textBox.value.length > maxLength - 1) textBox.value = textBox.value.substring(0, maxLength);
    }
    jQuery(textBox).parent().parent().find(".char-count").html(maxLength - textBox.value.length);
}

function checkSpecialKeys(e) {
    if (e.keyCode != 8 && e.keyCode != 46 && e.keyCode != 37 && e.keyCode != 38 && e.keyCode != 39 && e.keyCode != 40)
        return false;
    else
        return true;
}






function selectAbo(id,n){
    jQuery('#aboLink_'+id).attr('data-id',id+'_'+n);
    jQuery('.aboSel_'+id).removeClass('aboSelActive');
    jQuery('#aboSel_'+id+'_'+n).addClass('aboSelActive');
}
function aboForm(){
    var caller = jQuery('#login_caller').val();
    jQuery('#loginContent').html('');
    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'get',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'abo_form',
            caller : caller
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            jQuery('#loginContent').html(response.code);
        },
    });
}
function openAbo(id){
    var abo = 'abo-'+jQuery('#aboLink_'+id).attr('data-id');
    openLogin(abo);
}




function openLogin(caller,email){
    var thisCaller = '';
    if(typeof caller != 'undefined'){
        thisCaller = caller;
    }
    else if(typeof jQuery('#login_caller').val() != 'undefined'){
        thisCaller = jQuery('#login_caller').val();
    }

    var thisEmail = '';
    if(typeof email != 'undefined'){
        thisEmail = email;
    }
    else if(typeof jQuery('#login_email').val() != 'undefined'){
        thisEmail = jQuery('#login_email').val();
    }

    
    jQuery('#loginContent').html('');
    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'get',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'login_field_email',
            caller : thisCaller,
            email : thisEmail
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            jQuery('#loginContent').html(response.code);
            if(response.loginPopup == 1){
                
                UIkit.modal('#loginModal').show();
            }
        },
    });
}
function checkLoginEmail(){
    var caller = jQuery('#login_caller').val();
    var email = jQuery('#login_email').val();

    
    jQuery('#loginContent').html('');
    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'get',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'login_check_email',
            email : email,
            caller : caller
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            jQuery('#loginContent').html(response.code);
        },
    });

}

function login(){
    var caller = jQuery('#login_caller').val();
    var passwort = jQuery('#login_passwort').val();
    var email = jQuery('#login_email').val();
    var remember = 0;
    if(jQuery('#rememberme').is(':checked')){
        remember = 1;
    }

    jQuery('#loginContent').html('');
    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'get',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'login_login',
            email : email,
            passwort : passwort,
            remember : remember,
            caller : caller
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            jQuery('#loginContent').html(response.code);
        },
    });
}

function ghostlogin(){
    var email = jQuery('#login_email').val();
    var key = jQuery('#login_key').val();
    var caller = jQuery('#login_caller').val();

    if(jQuery('#loginModal').is(':visible')){
        var site_prefix = '/';
        if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
            site_prefix = '/fr/';
        }
        jQuery.ajax({
            url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
            type : 'get',
            dataType: 'JSON',
            data : {
                action : 'login_ghost',
                email : email,
                key : key,
            },
            success : function( response ) {
                
                if(response.success == 1){
                    clearInterval(doGhostLogin);
                    jQuery('#loggedInIcon').show();
                    jQuery('#loggedOutIcon').hide();
                    if(caller.substring(0, 3) == 'abo'){
                        showAboForm(caller);
                    }
                    else{
                        
                        window.location.href='/';
                    }
                }
            },
        });
    }
    else{
        clearInterval(doGhostLogin);
    }
}



function createAccount(typ){
    jQuery('#login_terms_message').hide();
    var caller = jQuery('#login_caller').val();
    var user = jQuery('#login_user').val();
    var email = jQuery('#login_email').val();

    if (jQuery("#login_terms").is(':checked')){
        jQuery('#loginContent').html('');
        var site_prefix = '/';
        if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
            site_prefix = '/fr/';
        }
        jQuery.ajax({
            url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
            type : 'get',
            dataType: 'JSON',
            data : {
                action : 'login_create_account',
                user : user,
                email : email,
                caller : caller,
                typ : typ
            },
            success : function( response ) {
                jQuery('#loginContent').html(response.code);
            },
        });
    }
    else{
        jQuery('#login_terms_message').fadeIn();
    }
}

    var caller = jQuery('#login_caller').val();
    var email = jQuery('#login_email').val();

    jQuery('#loginContent').html('');
    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'get',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'login_passwort_vergessen',
            email : email,
            caller : caller
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            jQuery('#loginContent').html(response.code);
        },
    });
}

function checkKundennummer(){
    var kundennummer = jQuery('#login_kundennummer').val();
    var plz = jQuery('#login_plz').val();
    var caller = jQuery('#login_caller').val();

    if(jQuery('#accountContent').is(':visible')){
        jQuery('#accountContent').html('');
    }
    else{
        jQuery('#loginContent').html('');
    }
    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'get',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'login_check_kundennummer',
            kundennummer : kundennummer,
            plz : plz,
            caller : caller
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            if(jQuery('#accountContent').is(':visible')){
                jQuery('#accountContent').html(response.code);
            }
            else{
                jQuery('#loginContent').html(response.code);
            }
        },
    });
}


function addKundennummer(){
    var kundennummer = '';
    var plz = '';
    var caller = '';
    if(jQuery('#kundennummer').length){
        kundennummer = jQuery('#kundennummer').val();
    };
    if(jQuery('#plz').length){
        plz = jQuery('#plz').val();
    };

    jQuery('#accountContent').html('');
    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'get',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'login_check_kundennummer',
            kundennummer : kundennummer,
            plz : plz,
            caller : caller,
            firstcall : 1
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            jQuery('#accountContent').html(response.code);
        },
    });
    
    if(!jQuery('#accountModal').is(':visible')){
        UIkit.modal('#accountModal').show();
    }
}

function setInputFocus(){
    if(jQuery('#loginModal').is(':visible')){
        var done = 0;
        jQuery('#loginModal input[type=text]').each(function(){
            if(jQuery(this).val() == ''){
                jQuery(this).focus();
                done = 1;
                return false; 
            }
        });
        if(done == 0){
            jQuery('#loginModal input[type=password]').each(function(){
                if(jQuery(this).val() == ''){
                    jQuery(this).focus();
                    done = 1;
                    return false; 
                }
            });
        }
    }
    else if(jQuery('#aboModal').is(':visible')){
        var done = 0;
        jQuery('#aboModal input[type=text]').each(function(){
            if(jQuery(this).val() == ''){
                jQuery(this).focus();
                done = 1;
                return false; 
            }
        });
        if(done == 0){
            jQuery('#aboModal input[type=password]').each(function(){
                if(jQuery(this).val() == ''){
                    jQuery(this).focus();
                    done = 1;
                    return false; 
                }
            });
        }
    }
}




disableLoad = 0;
function homemoreposts(url){
    if(disableLoad == 0){
        disableLoad = 1;
        var domain = url;
        var start = jQuery('#homemoreposts').attr('data-start');
        var notin = jQuery('#homemoreposts').attr('data-notin');
        var wno = jQuery('#homemoreposts').attr('data-wno');
        var wno2 = jQuery('#homemoreposts').attr('data-wno2');

        jQuery.ajax({
            url : domain+'/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
            type : 'get',
            dataType: 'JSON',
            data : {
                action : 'homemoreposts',
                start : start,
                notin : notin,
                wno : wno,
                wno2 : wno2,
            },
            success : function( response ) {
                jQuery('#homemoreposts').attr('data-start',response.nextstart);
                jQuery('#homemoreposts').attr('data-wno',response.wno);
                jQuery('#homemoreposts').attr('data-wno2',response.wno2);
                jQuery('#homemoreposts').append(response.posts);
                disableLoad = 0;
                a2a.init_all();
                jQuery(".teaserwerbung").unbind('inview');
                initInView();
                
                
            },
            error : function (){
                disableLoad = 0;
            },
            complete: function () {
                disableLoad = 0;
            }
        });
        return false;
    }
}


disableLoadPostlist = 0;
function postlistmoreposts(url){
    if(disableLoadPostlist == 0){
        disableLoadPostlist = 1;
        var domain = url;
        var start = jQuery('#postlistmoreposts').attr('data-start');
        var posttyp = jQuery('#postlistmoreposts').attr('data-typ');
        var autor = jQuery('#postlistmoreposts').attr('data-autor');

        jQuery.ajax({
            url : domain+'/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
            type : 'get',
            dataType: 'JSON',
            data : {
                action : 'postlistmoreposts',
                start : start,
                posttyp : posttyp,
                autor: autor,
            },
            success : function( response ) {
                jQuery('#postlistmoreposts').attr('data-start',response.nextstart);
                jQuery('#postlistmoreposts').append(response.posts);
                disableLoadPostlist = 0;
                a2a.init_all();
            },
            error : function (){
            },
            complete: function () {
            }
        });
        return false;
    }
}

function createAppAboCookie(abo,hash,action){
    if(typeof action != 'undefined' && action == 'off'){
        createCookie('ww_app_abo_id', '', -1);
        createCookie('ww_app_abo_hash', '', -1);
    }
    else if(typeof abo != 'undefined' && typeof hash != 'undefined'){
        
        createCookie('ww_app_abo_id', abo, 30);
        createCookie('ww_app_abo_hash', hash, 30);
    }
}




function modalcontent(url){
    if(url){
        if(url.includes(window.location.hostname)){
            url = url+'?popup';
        }
        jQuery('#contentModal').find('iframe').attr('src',url);
        UIkit.modal('#contentModal').show();
    }
}


function doSearch(s){
    jQuery('#searchFieldQuick').val(s);
    jQuery('#searchFormQuick').submit();
}



function goBack(){
    if(jQuery('#post_0').length){
        checkPostDetail();
    }
    else{
        window.history.back();
    }
}


function togglePassword(e,t){
    var x = document.getElementById(e);
    if (x.type === "password") {
        x.type = "text";
        jQuery(t).attr('uk-icon','unlock');
    } else {
        x.type = "password";
        jQuery(t).attr('uk-icon','lock');
    }
}

        iab = ''
    }) {
    console.log(iab);

}

window.appabo = {};
function getUserAbo(id){

    if(!jQuery.isEmptyObject(window.appabo)){
        return window.appabo;
    };

    
    var ausgabe = '';
    if(jQuery('#ausgabeImageContent').length){
        if(typeof jQuery('#ausgabeImageContent').attr('data-ausgabe') != 'undefined'){
            ausgabe = jQuery('#ausgabeImageContent').attr('data-ausgabe');
        }
    }

    if(jQuery('.ausgabeLinkContent').length){
        if(typeof jQuery('.ausgabeLinkContent').attr('data-ausgabe') != 'undefined'){
            ausgabe = jQuery('.ausgabeLinkContent').attr('data-ausgabe');
        }
    }

    var site_prefix = '/';
    if (window.location.pathname.startsWith('/fr/')) {
        site_prefix = '/fr/';
    }
    jQuery.ajax({
        url : site_prefix+'wp-admin/admin-ajax.php',
        type : 'get',
        dataType: 'JSON',
        data : {
            action : 'getuserabo',
            ausgabe : ausgabe,
        },
        success : function( response ) {
            window.appabo = response;
            
            if(response.status == 0){
                jQuery('.headerIconAbo').fadeIn();
            }
            if(typeof response.newsletter === 'undefined' || response.newsletter == false){
                jQuery('#newsletterWrapper').fadeIn();
                jQuery('#ctaEmail').val(response.useremail);
            }

            if(response.loggedin == 1){
                jQuery('.usernameOutput').html(response.username);
                jQuery('#loggedOutIcon').hide();
                jQuery('#loggedInIcon').fadeIn();
                var splash = readCookie('ww_splash');
                if(splash == null){
                    createCookie('ww_splash', '1', 0);
                }
            }
            else{
                jQuery('#loggedInIcon').hide();
                jQuery('#loggedOutIcon').fadeIn();
                var splash = readCookie('ww_splash');
                if(splash == null){
                    createCookie('ww_splash', '1', 0);
                    var appStatus = readCookie('ww_app');
                    
                    if(appStatus == 'app') {
                    } else {
                        if(response.mandant != 4){
                            jQuery('.splash').fadeIn();
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            
            

            
            setFreemiumMessage(response.status, response.loggedin, response.freearticle, response.freemax, response.abourl, response.accounturl, id, response.mandant, response.issues);

            
            setAusgabeImage(response.loggedin, response.abourl, response.accounturl, response.ausgabeimage, response.ausgabepdffile, id, response.mandant);


            
            var issues = response.issues;
            var aIssues = issues.split('|');
            var kaufen = jQuery('.kaufenbutton').attr('data-ausgabe');
            if(typeof kaufen != 'undefined'){
                if(aIssues.includes(kaufen)){
                    jQuery('.kaufenbutton>div').remove();
                } else {
                    
                    jQuery('.kaufenbutton').animate({ opacity: 1 });
                }
            }

            
            clearReloadPage();

            if(response.user == '1' || response.user == '4275' || response.user == '12840' || response.user == '7389' || response.user == '3529'){
                
            }

            return window.appabo;

        },
        error : function(response) {
            if(response.status == 0){
                
                
                
                
                jQuery('.weeklyContent .contentBody').html('');
            }
        }
    });
}


function setFreemiumMessage(hasabo,loggedin,freearticle,freemax,abourl,accounturl,postid,mandant,issues){
    var ausgabe_gekauft = 0;
    var aIssues = issues.split('|');
    var kaufen = jQuery('.kaufenbutton').attr('data-ausgabe');
    if(typeof kaufen != 'undefined'){
        if(aIssues.includes(kaufen)){
            ausgabe_gekauft = 1;
        }
    }


    if(hasabo == 0 && ausgabe_gekauft == 0){

        
        
        

        
        var dv = readCookie('ww_new');
        var dv = 1;

        
        if(jQuery('#freemiumMessageAll').length){
            var aFreearticle = freearticle.split(",");
            if(aFreearticle.length >= freemax){
                var content = '';

                if(dv == 1){
                    content+= '<div class="paywall">';
                        content+= '<div class="paywall-inner">';
                            content+= '<div class="paywall-image"><img src="/weltwoche/startpage/assets/img/piglet02.svg" alt="Ihr Gratis-Kontingent ist aufgebraucht." itemprop="image" class="article-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>';
                            content+= '<div class="paywall-body">';
                                content+= '<div class="paywall-title-wrapper">';
                                    content+= '<div class="paywall-title">Ihr Gratis-Kontingent ist aufgebraucht.</div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="paywall-cta-wrapper">';
                                    content+= '<div class="paywall-button-wrapper">';
                                        content+= '<button type="button" class="paywall-button" onclick="location.href=\'/abonnemente/\'">ABO Abschliessen</button>';
                                    content+= '</div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="paywall-text-wrapper">';
                                    content+= '<div class="paywall-text">Wie wäre es mit einem Schnupper-Abo?<br>Lesen Sie Artikel aus <b>8 Weltwoche-Ausgaben für CHF 19.-</b></div>';
                                    
                                    if (mandant == 3 && loggedin == 1){
                                        content+= '<div id="tiun-read-button-div" class="paywall-text paywall-footer uk-margin-small-top"></div>';
                                    }
                                content+= '</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="paywall-footer-wrapper">';
                                    content+= '<div class="paywall-footer"><a href="/abonnemente/">Abos vergleichen</a></div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                        content+= '</div>';
                    content+= '</div>';
                } else {
                    if(mandant == 4){
                        content+= '<div class="uk-margin-top">';
                            content+= '<div id="loginContentTop">';
                                content+= '<div id="loginContentTopSecond"></div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                            content+= '<div class="loginContentTitel">Article d\'abonnement</div>';
                            content+= '<div class="loginContentText">';
                                content+= '<div>En tant que non-abonné connecté, vous disposez d\'un crédit de cinq articles d\'abonnement gratuits.</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="uk-margin-small-top">Vous avez lu tous les articles gratuits '+freemax+'.</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="uk-margin-small-top">Nous vous recommandons d\'acheter un abonnement dans la <a target="_top" href="'+abourl+'">Boutique d\'abonnement</a> – cela en vaut la peine!</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="uk-margin-small-top loginContentTextSmall">Déjà abonné? Associez votre <a target="_top" href="'+accounturl+'">compte</a> à votre numéro de client.</div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                        content+= '</div>';
                    } else{


                        content+= '<div class="uk-margin-top">';
                            content+= '<div id="loginContentTop">';
                                content+= '<div id="loginContentTopSecond"></div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                            content+= '<div class="loginContentTitel">ABO-Artikel</div>';
                            content+= '<div class="loginContentText">';
                                content+= '<div>Als eingeloggter Nicht-Abonnent haben Sie ein Guthaben von fünf kostenlosen Abo-Artikeln.</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="uk-margin-small-top">Sie haben alle '+freemax+' kostenlosen Artikel gelesen.</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="uk-margin-small-top">Wir empfehlen Ihnen, im <a target="_top" href="'+abourl+'">Abo-Shop</a> ein Abo zu lösen – es lohnt sich!</div>';
                                if (mandant == 3 && loggedin == 1){
                                    content+= '<div id="tiun-read-button-div" class="uk-margin-small-top"></div>';
                                }
                                content+= '<div class="uk-margin-small-top loginContentTextSmall">Sie sind bereits Abonnent? Verbinden Sie Ihr <a target="_top" href="'+accounturl+'">Konto</a> mit Ihrer Kundennummer.</div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                        content+= '</div>';
                    }
                }

                jQuery('#freemiumMessageAll').html(content);

                
                if (mandant == 3 && loggedin == 1){
                    jQuery("#tiun-read-button-div").html(jQuery("#tiun-read-button").html());
                    jQuery("#tiun-read-button-div div").show() ;
                }

            }
            else if(jQuery('#freemiumMessage').length){
                var aFreearticle = freearticle.split(",");
                postid = postid.toString();
                var no = aFreearticle.indexOf(postid);
                no++;
                if(no > 0){
                    var content = '';

                    if(dv == 1){
                        var noch = parseInt(freemax)-parseInt(no);
                        var satz = 'Noch '+ noch + ' von ' + freemax + ' Artikeln gratis verfügbar';
                        if(noch == 0){
                            satz = 'Das ist der letzte von ' + freemax + ' gratis Artikeln';
                        }
                        content+= '<div class="paywall">';
                            content+= '<div class="paywall-inner">';
                                content+= '<div class="paywall-image"><img src="/weltwoche/startpage/assets/img/piglet01.svg" alt="'+satz+'" itemprop="image" class="article-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>';
                                content+= '<div class="paywall-body">';
                                    content+= '<div class="paywall-title-wrapper">';
                                        content+= '<div class="paywall-title">'+satz+'</div>';
                                    content+= '</div>';
                                    content+= '<div class="paywall-cta-wrapper">';
                                        content+= '<div class="paywall-button-wrapper">';
                                            content+= '<button type="button" class="paywall-button">Jetzt weiterLesen</button>';
                                        content+= '</div>';
                                    content+= '</div>';
                                    content+= '<div class="paywall-footer-wrapper">';
                                        content+= '<div class="paywall-footer">Mit Abo unbegrenzter Zugang – ab CHF 9.- im Monat. <a href="/abonnemente/">Mehr erfahren</a></div>';
                                    content+= '</div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                        content+= '</div>';
                    } else {
                        if(mandant == 4){
                            content+= '<div class="uk-margin-top">';
                                content+= '<div id="loginContentTop">';
                                    content+= '<div id="loginContentTopSecond"></div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="loginContentTitel">Article d\'abonnement</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="loginContentText">';
                                    content+= '<div>En tant que non-abonné connecté, vous disposez d\'un crédit de cinq articles d\'abonnement gratuits.</div>';
                                    if(no == 0){
                                        content+= '<div class="">Ceci est l\'un des articles '+freemax+'.</div>';
                                    }
                                    else{
                                        content+= '<div class="">Il s\'agit du '+no+'. des articles '+freemax+'.</div>';
                                    }
                                    content+= '<div class="">Nous vous recommandons alors d\'acheter un abonnement dans la <a target="_top" href="'+abourl+'">Boutique d\'abonnement</a> – cela en vaut la peine!</div>';
                                    content+= '<div class="uk-margin-small-top loginContentTextSmall">Déjà abonné? Associez votre <a target="_top" href="'+accounturl+'">compte</a> à votre numéro de client.</div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                        } else {
                            content+= '<div class="uk-margin-top">';
                                content+= '<div id="loginContentTop">';
                                    content+= '<div id="loginContentTopSecond"></div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="loginContentTitel">ABO-Artikel</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="loginContentText">';
                                    content+= '<div>Als eingeloggter Nicht-Abonnent haben Sie ein Guthaben von fünf kostenlosen Abo-Artikeln.</div>';
                                    if(no == 0){
                                        content+= '<div class="">Dies ist einer von '+freemax+' Artikeln.</div>';
                                    }
                                    else{
                                        content+= '<div class="">Dies ist der '+no+'. von '+freemax+' Artikeln.</div>';
                                    }
                                    content+= '<div class="">Danach empfehlen wir Ihnen, im <a target="_top" href="'+abourl+'">Abo-Shop</a> ein Abo zu lösen – es lohnt sich!</div>';
                                    content+= '<div class="uk-margin-small-top loginContentTextSmall">Sie sind bereits Abonnent? Verbinden Sie Ihr <a target="_top" href="'+accounturl+'">Konto</a> mit Ihrer Kundennummer.</div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                        }
                    }

                    jQuery('#freemiumMessage').html(content);
                }
            }

        }
        
        else if(jQuery('#freemiumMessage').length){
            var aFreearticle = freearticle.split(",");
            postid = postid.toString();
            var no = aFreearticle.indexOf(postid);
            no++;
            if(no > 0){
                var content = '';

                if(dv == 1){
                    var noch = parseInt(freemax)-parseInt(no);
                    var satz = 'Noch '+ noch + ' von ' + freemax + ' Artikeln gratis verfügbar';
                    if(noch == 0){
                        satz = 'Das ist der letzte von ' + freemax + ' gratis Artikeln';
                    }
                    content+= '<div class="paywall">';
                        content+= '<div class="paywall-inner">';
                            content+= '<div class="paywall-image"><img src="/weltwoche/startpage/assets/img/piglet01.svg" alt="'+satz+'" itemprop="image" class="article-img" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>';
                            content+= '<div class="paywall-body">';
                                content+= '<div class="paywall-title-wrapper">';

                                content+= '</div>';

                                    content+= '<div class="paywall-button-wrapper">';
                                        content+= '<button type="button" class="paywall-button">Jetzt weiterLesen</button>';
                                    content+= '</div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="paywall-footer-wrapper">';
                                    content+= '<div class="paywall-footer">Mit Abo unbegrenzter Zugang – ab CHF 9.- im Monat. <a href="/abonnemente/">Mehr erfahren</a></div>';
                                content+= '</div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                        content+= '</div>';
                    content+= '</div>';
                } else {
                    if(mandant == 4){
                        content+= '<div class="uk-margin-top">';
                            content+= '<div id="loginContentTop">';
                                content+= '<div id="loginContentTopSecond"></div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                            content+= '<div class="loginContentTitel">Article d\'abonnement</div>';
                            content+= '<div class="loginContentText">';
                                content+= '<div>En tant que non-abonné connecté, vous disposez d\'un crédit de cinq articles d\'abonnement gratuits.</div>';
                                if(no == 0){
                                    content+= '<div class="">Ceci est l\'un des articles '+freemax+'.</div>';
                                }
                                else{
                                    content+= '<div class="">Il s\'agit du '+no+'. des articles '+freemax+'.</div>';
                                }
                                content+= '<div class="">Nous vous recommandons alors d\'acheter un abonnement dans la <a target="_top" href="'+abourl+'">Boutique d\'abonnement</a> – cela en vaut la peine!</div>';
                                content+= '<div class="uk-margin-small-top loginContentTextSmall">Déjà abonné? Associez votre <a target="_top" href="'+accounturl+'">compte</a> à votre numéro de client.</div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                        content+= '</div>';
                    } else {
                        content+= '<div class="uk-margin-top">';
                            content+= '<div id="loginContentTop">';
                                content+= '<div id="loginContentTopSecond"></div>';
                            content+= '</div>';
                            content+= '<div class="loginContentTitel">ABO-Artikel</div>';
